headline: 3M (MMM) Stock Looks 10% Undervalued After CEO Highlights Margin Progress And Efficiency Gains
summary: CEO comments and guidance set the tone 3M (MMM) shares moved after CEO Bill Brown used a recent industry conference to underline progress on the company’s plan, emphasizing order momentum, organic revenue growth confidence, and ongoing margin and efficiency efforts. See our latest analysis for 3M. Those comments come at a time when 3M’s share price has gained 10.26% over the past month and 4.60% over the past quarter. However, the year-to-date share price return is down 2.42%, while longer...
